report.summary: Cycle-close: 4 new pages built today (2 committed in e3f63fc, 2 queued uncommitted), 36 uncommitted files including 2 new learn guides + social assets. All 6 API routes structurally stable; defi-yields still needs fallback data. No new build-breaking regressions.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: 4 recently committed pages verified: crypto-staking-guide-2026, euler-v2-modular-lending, flash-loans-defi, stablecoin-yield-tracker — all have metadata, no 'use client' + metadata conflicts, JSON-LD present
2 new uncommitted pages built today: drift-protocol-285m-hack-analysis-2026, polkadot-staking-halving-guide-2026 — both have page.tsx files, added to PUBLISH_QUEUE
2 pages from today's build report (crypto-otc-trading, ethereum-blob-economics) — page.tsx NOT YET scaffolded (build report only, files not created yet)
632 published slugs, 1,246 total page.tsx files, 310 learn pages — up 2 pages from last cycle
109 published slugs missing page.tsx (17.6%) — mostly blog/courses using dynamic routes
141 TS errors in 4 files unchanged (non-blocking via ignoreBuildErrors:true)
No new regressions detected in recently changed files
Live site verification blocked (network egress restricted from sandbox)

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: All 6 API route files present and structurally sound: prices, trending, fear-greed, market-metrics, market-dominance, defi-yields
/api/prices: HEALTHY — in-memory cache (60s), fallback data, rate limiting, revalidate=60, CoinGecko URL correct
/api/trending: HEALTHY — in-memory cache (300s), stale fallback, rate limiting. Missing revalidate export (minor)
/api/fear-greed: HEALTHY — in-memory cache (600s), stale fallback, rate limiting. Missing revalidate export and Cache-Control on error path (minor)
/api/market-metrics: HEALTHY — in-memory cache (60s), hardcoded mock fallback, uses Promise.allSettled. Missing revalidate export, no route-level rate limit
/api/market-dominance: HEALTHY — in-memory cache (300s), hardcoded fallback, revalidate=300. No route-level rate limit (minor)
/api/defi-yields: WARNING — no route-level cache (delegates to cachedFetchJSON), no hardcoded fallback data, no rate limiting. Most vulnerable route
/api/health: HEALTHY — rate limited, proper status codes. Note: health checks are simulated (Math.random), not actual service pings
External API URLs all correct (CoinGecko, DefiLlama, Alternative.me)
Live endpoint health unverifiable (egress blocked)

Build config stable — no infrastructure changes needed
Recommend: batch commit new learn pages + OG assets + published-pages queue update, then deploy

sections.title: Project Manager

Social content: new social drafts v23 + 2 social cards (drift hack, wormhole unlock) created

Next actions: (1) scaffold OTC trading + blob economics pages, (2) commit batch with new pages, (3) deploy, (4) promote queued pages to PUBLISHED_PAGES
No blockers requiring Jefe attention
